Lines.FullText: Each status has a unique name and represents an actual status related to the openDAQ Component,

Lines.FullText: such as connection status, synchronization status, etc. The statuses' values are represented

Elements.RawText: such as connection status, synchronization status, etc. The statuses' values are represented

Description.RawText:
*
 * Each status has a unique name and represents an actual status related to the openDAQ Component,
 * such as connection status, synchronization status, etc. The statuses' values are represented
 * by Enumeration objects.
